title: xanthium strumarium var. wootonii
intro: Xanthium strumarium var. wootonii, commonly known as cocklebur, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Xanthium strumarium var. wootonii is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
